output:
All services are running. Here's the report:

  codeharness-verify: ✅ running

note: docker-compose.harness.yml attempted to start duplicate containers on the same ports — conflict detected and cleaned up. The shared stack (started via templates/compose/victoria.yml) owns all ports and is healthy.
